name: SmsLog_StatusPriority_FinalOverBillableOverLatest
description: When multiple SmsLogStatuses exist for same SmsLogId, priority selection: IsFinal(3) > IsBillable(2) > default(1), then latest by DateReceivedUtc wins.
notes: Governs which SmsLogStatus wins when DLR callbacks arrive out of order. Eventually consistent.

name: SmsLog_StatusCount_UCS2
description: SMS part count for UCS2 (unicode): single part if length <= 70 chars, else ceil(length / 63.0).

name: SmsLog_StatusCount_GSM7
description: SMS part count for GSM7: single part if length <= 160 chars, else ceil(length / 153.0).

name: SmsLog_RetryChain_ThreeLoaders
description: Fast-path dispatch uses RoundRobin with 3 loaders: main(10300→10301), retry1(10302→10303, chunkSize=100), retry2(10304→10305, chunkSize=1).
notes: chunkSize=1 on second retry = single-message fallback. No fourth retry — message stays at 10305 until manual intervention.

name: SmsGroup_SendActivate_IdempotencyGuard
description: SendSmsGroupAsync returns immediately if smsGroup.Active is already true. Prevents double-activation.
notes: Explicit guard — not a DB constraint. Relies on in-memory state of loaded SmsGroup.

name: SmsGroup_MarkSent_IdempotencyGuard
description: MarkSent() sets DateSentUtc only if null. Returns true if set, false if already set. Idempotent.
enforcement: if (!DateSentUtc.HasValue) { DateSentUtc = DateTime.UtcNow; return true; } return false;

name: SmsLog_StatusImport_ChunkProcessing
description: UpdateStatusOnSmsLogsAsync processes SmsLogStatuses in chunks of 300. Marks ALL chunk IDs as Imported after processing, not just the winning statuses.
notes: Imported=true marks processed. Non-winning statuses are still imported (just not applied to SmsLog.StatusCode).

name: SmsGroup_WebLookupGate_IsWebLookupNeeded
description: Web-server lookup (synchronous) is used only when ALL conditions met: (1) no DateDelayToUtc, (2) ByAddress method, (3) FromApi=true, (4) non-std-receiver items <= 5, (5) no zip-only items. OR: ByStdReceivers method with no DateDelayToUtc.
enforcement: private static bool IsWebLookupNeeded(SmsGroup smsGroup) { if (!smsGroup.DateDelayToUtc.HasValue) { if (ByAddress) isSmallGroup = smsGroup.FromApi && Count<=5 && !zipOnly; else if (ByStdReceivers) isSmallGroup = true; } return isSmallGroup; }
notes: DateDelayToUtc present = always batch, never web lookup.

name: SmsGroup_LastMinuteLookup_TimingBypass
description: For LastMinuteLookup groups WITH a DateDelayToUtc: lookup is NOT dispatched at activation time. Condition: AllowLookup && (!LastMinuteLookup || !DateDelayToUtc.HasValue). When both LastMinuteLookup=true AND DateDelayToUtc is set, condition is false.
notes: Lookup is expected to run near DateDelayToUtc (via batch job). Not enforced in this Layer 0 — trigger is UNKNOWN (batch scheduler).

name: SmsGroup_LargeBroadcast_25000Threshold
description: If distinct kvhx count > 25000 AND group has at least one channel configured: send warning email to LargeBroadcastMailAddress. Send continues regardless.
notes: Warning only — not a hard stop. Email sent to ProductConstants.LargeBroadcastMailAddress.

name: SmsGroup_NoRecipients_Guard
description: If SmsGroupItems is empty AND GeoObjects is empty AND HasRecipients() returns false: throw NoRecipientsException.

name: SmsLog_GatewayRouting_Priority
description: Gateway routing priority: (1) TestMode → TestWorkload, (2) SmsSendAs=TreNRG (case-insensitive) → GatewayApi, (3) highPriority=true → GatewayApi, (4) Strex enabled for country → StrexWorkload, (5) default → GatewayApi.
enforcement: if (TestMode) test; else if (SmsSendAs=TreNRG OrdinalIgnoreCase) gateway; else if (_highPriority) gateway; else if (enabledStrex[Country]) strex; else gateway;
notes: TreNRG is hardcoded string — no DB config, no feature toggle. OrdinalIgnoreCase = case-insensitive match.

name: SmsLog_StrexRouting_CountryToggles
description: Strex routing is gated per country by AppSetting toggles: EnableStrexDK(DK), EnableStrexSE(SE), EnableStrexFI(FI), EnableStrexNO(NO). Default value '0' = disabled.

name: SmsLog_GatewayCallback_IntParse_CONFLICTING
description: GatewayApiCallbackAsync parses callback.userref/Reference as int (not long). SmsLog.Id is long. For SmsLogId > 2,147,483,647: int.TryParse returns false, smsLogId=0, no SmsLogStatus created. Silent failure.
enforcement: if (int.TryParse(callback.userref, out int smsLogId) || int.TryParse(callback.Reference, out smsLogId))
impact: Lost delivery callbacks for SmsLog.Id > 2,147,483,647. Silent failure — no exception thrown.

name: SmsGroup_Create_MessageRequired_WhenSendSMS
description: If SendSMS=true and SmsData.Message is null/whitespace: throw InvalidOperationException.
enforcement: if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(smsGroup.SmsData?.Message) && smsGroup.SendSMS) throw new InvalidOperationException("SmsGroup.Message must not be empty")

name: SmsGroup_Create_EmailSubjectWithoutMessage_Guard
description: If SendEmail=true, EmailData.Subject is not empty, but EmailData.Message is null/whitespace: throw InvalidOperationException.

name: SmsGroup_SmsSendAs_MaxLength11
description: SmsSendAs is truncated to max 11 characters when set on SmsLog. Defined in GeneralConstants.SmsSendAsMaxLength.
enforcement: result.SmsSendAsTruncated = smsSendAs.Length <= GeneralConstants.SmsSendAsMaxLength ? smsSendAs : smsSendAs.Substring(0, GeneralConstants.SmsSendAsMaxLength);

name: SmsGroup_EmailSendAs_MaxLength100
description: EmailSendAs is truncated to max 100 characters. Defined in GeneralConstants.EmailSendAsMaxLength.
enforcement: result.EmailSendAsTruncated = emailSendAs.Length <= GeneralConstants.EmailSendAsMaxLength ? emailSendAs : emailSendAs.Substring(0, GeneralConstants.EmailSendAsMaxLength);

name: Toggle_DisableMessageBackgroundService_HardStop
description: If AppSetting.DisableMessageBackgroundService = '1': DoWorkAsync returns immediately. No SMS/Email/Voice processed. Default value = '1' (safe-off in dev).
notes: Same toggle in EmailBackgroundService.cs, VoiceBackgroundService.cs, SendGridBackgroundService.cs — shared kill switch.

name: Toggle_DisableAllBroadcasts_SkipIteration
description: If AppSetting.DisableAllBroadcasts = '1': skip current processing iteration but keep thread running. Default value = '0'.
notes: Checked AFTER WaitForMessages(). Thread stays alive. API-controllable via SuperAdminController.SetDisableAllBroadcastsState.

name: SmsLogStatus_MultiChannel_SharedWriteTarget
description: SmsLogStatuses table is written by all 4 channels: SMS (SmsGatewayStatusWriter), Email (SendGridStatusWriter), Voice, Eboks (EboksCvrStatusManager, EboksAmplifyStatusManager). No domain boundary at write level.
notes: Shared kernel table. SmsLog.StatusCode updated across all channels in same transaction pattern.

name: SmsLog_QuickResponse_AutoInject
description: If SmsGroup has QuickResponse options configured AND message does NOT already contain [QR link field]: append newline + [QR link field] to message text. Applied at activation time.
notes: Applied to SMS, Email, and Eboks channels simultaneously.

name: SmsGroup_BroadcastReceipt_RoleExemption
description: Receipt email after broadcast is skipped if profile has role BroadcastNoReciept.

name: SmsGroup_Create_AlwaysOwner_Force
description: If profile has role AlwaysOwner: SendToOwner is forced to true regardless of user input.

name: SmsGroup_Create_DontSendEmail_Force
description: If profile has role DontSendEmail: SendEmail is forced to false regardless of user input.

name: SmsGroup_Create_CanSpecifyLookup_Gate
description: If profile does NOT have role CanSpecifyLookup: SendToAddress is forced to true (cannot opt out). If HAS role: user controls both SendToOwner and SendToAddress.

name: SmsGroup_Create_CanSelectLookupBusinessOrPrivate_Gate
description: If profile does NOT have role CanSelectLookupBusinessOrPrivate: LookupBusiness and LookupPrivate are both forced to true. If HAS role: user controls independently.

name: SmsGroup_MonthlyGroup_ReuseByName
description: Single-system messages reuse (or create) a monthly SmsGroup named '{SystemProfileName} MM-yyyy'. If a group with that name exists for the profile, it is reused. SmsGroupItem is always a new row.
enforcement: var currentGroupName = systemProfile.Name + " " + string.Format("{0:MM-yyyy}", _clock.Now()); var SG = await GetSmsGroupByNameAsync(currentGroupName, systemProfile.Id);
notes: Monthly group is Active=true, IsLookedUp=true from creation. SendAs updated if changed on reuse.

name: SmsGroup_DateDelayToUtc_AlwaysBatch
description: Presence of DateDelayToUtc unconditionally forces batch execution. IsWebLookupNeeded() returns false when DateDelayToUtc has value.
enforcement: if (!smsGroup.DateDelayToUtc.HasValue) { ... evaluate small group ... } return isSmallGroup;
notes: Scheduled messages always go through Azure Batch path. Cannot use web-server fast path.

name: SmsGroup_Deactivate_DeletesSmsLogs
description: DeactivatePlannedMessageAsync deletes all SmsLogs for the SmsGroup and resets WizardStep to 3. Destructive — not append-only.
notes: No soft-delete. SmsLogs are permanently removed. WizardStep=3 = Skriv besked.
